Name: QualityStatementName
Description: Name of the QualityStatement using the DDI Name structure.

Name: Label
Description: A display label for the QualityStatement.

Name: QualityStandardReference
Description: A formal description of a quality standard, and the quality concepts which it requires.

Name: OtherStatementOfQuality
Description: Describes the steps taken to ensure quality that are not related to a specific standard. Repeat the OtherQualityStatement for differing content if needed.

Name: ComplianceStatement
Description: A descriptive statement regarding the application of the selected standard or other means of quality control.

Name: Compliance
Description: Allows for a quality statement based on frameworks to be described using itemized properties. A reference to a concept, a coded value, or both can be used to specify the property from the standard framework identified in StandardUsed. ComplianceDescription can provide further details or a general description of compliance with a standard.
